title: neolitsea variabillima
intro: Neolitsea variabillima, also known as the variable neolitsea or fragrant neolitsea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, and has been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Neolitsea variabillima is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
